Learn the Science

Videos & Content

Teachings, readings, and explorations of the ancient science of the cards — from Sharon Jeffers and the Magi community.

▶
Foundations
Introduction to the Card System

How 52 cards map the whole of human experience — an overview of the system's origins and structure.

▶
Birth Cards
Reading Your Birth Card

A deep dive into how to interpret your birth card — the gifts, the shadows, and the life path it reveals.

▶
Relationships
Compatibility in the Cards

How two birth cards interact — the cards that govern attraction, challenge, and long-term connection.

▶
Timing
The Yearly Spread

How the cards move through time — the planetary spread, your personal year card, and what each season holds.

Video Library · Coming Soon

Full video content will be available to Seeker and Magi members. Learn about membership →
